html:
Monster Lasagna is a Meat Food item cooked in the Crock Pot by combining 2 Monster Food items, which include Monster Meat, Monster Jerky, Durians, and Jellyfish. It takes 10 seconds to cook.

Adding Twigs will result in Wet Goop, unless a Tallbird Egg or Fishes is also added, which will then result in Bacon and Eggs or Fishsticks, respectively.

Like other Monster Foods, it restores Hunger, but damages Health and Sanity. However, neither Webber nor Wilba will suffer the Health and Sanity penalty when eating it.

Prerequisites

  • Requires: 
  • Excludes:

Recipe

×2

×2

Examples

×2

×2

×2

×2

50% chance of producing Bacon and Eggs
50% chance of producing Mandrake Soup

×2

×2

×2

×2


Tips

  • While the Monster Lasagna damages health when eaten it still restores a big chunk of durability for both the Eye Mask and the Shield of Terror.
  • It is best to avoid this Crock Pot Recipe, as it restores less Hunger than most of what would be used as ingredients, and causes a bad chunk of Health and Sanity loss. Although cooked Monster Meats on their own would cause a lot less Health loss, eating two would cause the same Sanity loss as Monster Lasagna.
  • For Wilba, Monster Lasagna counts as one Monster Food towards her Werewilba transformation.

Trivia

  • Woodie's quote may be a reference to the comic Garfield, which revolves around a cat that loves lasagna.
  • During the Pig Fiesta event in the Hamlet DLC, Monster Lasagna takes on a more festive appearance.

Gallery

  • Monster Lasagna in Terraria
  • Original HD icon from Bonus Materials from CD Don't Starve.
  • Icon used as emoji for Official Klei Discord.

“Maybe I'm not so hungry after all...”
–Wanda

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Lasagna Quái là một Món Thịt được nấu trong Nồi Hầm bằng cách kết hợp 2 Món Ăn Quái, bao gồm Thịt Quái, Thịt Quái, Sầu Riêng và Sứa. Phải mất 10 giây để nấu ăn.

'''Monster Lasagna''' is a [[Meats|Meat]] [[Food]] [[item]] cooked in the [[Crock Pot]] by combining 2 [[Monster Food]] items, which include [[Monster Meat]], [[Monster Jerky]], [[Durian]]s, and [[Jellyfish]]. It takes 10 seconds to cook.

Adding [[Twigs]] will result in [[Wet Goop]], unless a [[Tallbird Egg]] or [[Fishes]] is also added, which will then result in [[Bacon and Eggs]] or [[Fishsticks]], respectively.

Like other Monster Foods, it restores [[Hunger]], but damages [[Health]] and [[Sanity]]. However, neither [[Webber]] nor [[Wilba]] will suffer the Health and Sanity penalty when eating it. 

== Prerequisites ==
*Requires: [[File:Monster Food Crock Pot.png|link=Monster Foods]]
*Excludes: [[File:Twigs.png|link=Twigs]]

== {{pic|32|Cookbook}} Recipe ==
{{Recipe
|item1 = Monster Foods
|count1 = 2
|item2 = Filler
|count2 = 2
|tool = Crock Pot
|result = Monster Lasagna
}}

|dlc = Shipwrecked
}}


== {{Pic|32|Prototype}} Tips ==
* While the Monster Lasagna damages health when eaten it still restores a big chunk of durability for both the [[Eye Mask]] and the [[Shield of Terror]].
*It is best to avoid this Crock Pot Recipe, as it restores less Hunger than most of what would be used as ingredients, and causes a bad chunk of Health and Sanity loss. Although cooked Monster Meats on their own would cause a lot less Health loss, eating two would cause the same Sanity loss as Monster Lasagna.
*For Wilba, Monster Lasagna counts as one Monster Food towards her [[Werewilba]] transformation.

== {{Pic32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
[[File:Monster Lasagna (Pig Fiesta).png|right]]

* Woodie's quote may be a reference to the comic ''[[wikipedia:Garfield|Garfield]]'', which revolves around a cat that loves lasagna.

* During the [[Pig Fiesta]] event in the ''[[Don't Starve: Hamlet|Hamlet]]'' DLC, Monster Lasagna takes on a more festive appearance.
